overview: Manazen is a SaaS corporate gifting and employee rewards platform marketing website. It showcases the platform's core features including corporate gifting, branded merchandise management, and data-driven insights with a professional B2B aesthetic.
features: Hero section with brand messaging and CTA
Platform overview with three core pillars
Customer segments for Startups, Mid-Sized, and Enterprise
Feature highlights and ROI callout section
Responsive design with brand color scheme
